debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    unfold fastCheckMem
    rcases h with ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, hpiv⟩
    split
    next heq =>
      simp [beq_iff_eq] at heq
      subst heq
      simp [hpiv]
    next hne =>
      simp [beq_iff_eq] at hne
      split
      next hlt =>
        rw [ih_l hol]
        constructor
        · exact Or.inl
        · rintro (hin | hin)
          · exact hin
          · exact (not_le_of_lt hlt (hge _ hin)).elim
      next hnlt =>
        rw [ih_r hor]
        constructor
        · exact Or.inr
        · rintro (hin | hin)
          · have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hnlt) hne
            exact (not_le_of_lt this (hle _ hin)).elim
          · exact hin

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    rcases h with ⟨h_le, h_ge, h_ord_l, h_ord_r, h_piv⟩
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · simp [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq; subst h_eq
      simp [h_piv]
    · rw [ih_l h_ord_l]
      constructor
      · intro h; left; exact h
      · rintro (h | h)
        · exact h
        · have := h_ge label h
          have := lt_of_lt_of_le h_lt this
          exact (lt_irrefl _ this).elim
    · rw [ih_r h_ord_r]
      constructor
      · intro h; right; exact h
      · rintro (h | h)
        · simp [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq
          have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_eq
          have := h_le label h
          have := lt_of_le_of_lt this h
          exact (lt_irrefl _ this).elim
        · exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, hv⟩
    unfold fastCheckMem
    split_ifs with heq hlt
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq; simp [hv]
    · rw [ihl hol]; constructor
      · intro h; left; assumption
      · rintro (h | h)
        · assumption
        · have := hge _ h; rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; linarith
    · rw [ihr hor]; constructor
      · intro h; right; assumption
      · rintro (h | h)
        · have := hle _ h; rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; linarith

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    rw [beq_iff_eq]
    rfl
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    unfold fastCheckMem
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨h_le, h_ge, h_ord_l, h_ord_r, h_v⟩
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq
      subst h_eq
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, h_v]
    · rw [ih_l h_ord_l]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem]
      constructor
      · intro h; left; assumption
      · rintro (hl | hr)
        · assumption
        · exact absurd (h_ge label hr) (not_le_of_lt h_lt)
    · rw [ih_r h_ord_r]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem]
      constructor
      · intro h; right; assumption
      · rintro (hl | hr)
        · have h_ne : v ≠ label := fun c => by
            rw [c] at h_eq
            simp at h_eq
          have h_gt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_ne
          exact absurd (h_le label hl) (not_le_of_lt h_gt)
        · assumption

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    obtain ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, hpiv⟩ := h
    split_ifs with heq hlt
    · simp at heq; subst heq
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, hpiv]
    · rw [ih_l hol]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem]
      constructor
      · intro H; left; exact H
      · rintro (H | H)
        · exact H
        · have : v ≤ label := hge _ H
          have : label < label := lt_of_lt_of_le hlt this
          exact (lt_irrefl _ this).elim
    · rw [ih_r hor]
      simp [LabelledTree.mem]
      constructor
      · intro H; right; exact H
      · rintro (H | H)
        · simp at heq; push_neg at hlt
          have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne hlt heq.symm
          have : label ≤ v := hle _ H
          have : label < label := lt_of_le_of_lt this ‹v < label›
          exact (lt_irrefl _ this).elim
        · exact H

    split
    · next h_eq =>

        constructor
        · exact Or.inl
        · rintro (h | h)
          · exact h

      · next h_nlt =>
        rw [ih_r h_ord_r]

        constructor
        · exact Or.inr
        · rintro (h | h)
          · exact (lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_le_of_lt (h_le _ h) h_gt)).elim
          · exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hol, hor, hm⟩
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    split
    · next eq => simp [eq, hm]
    · next ne =>
      split
      · next lt =>
        rw [ihl hol]
        constructor
        · intro h; left; exact h
        · rintro (h | h)
          · exact h
          · have := lt_of_le_of_lt (hr _ h) lt
            exact absurd this (lt_irrefl _)
      · next nlt =>
        rw [ihr hor]
        constructor
        · intro h; right; exact h
        · rintro (h | h)
          · have := le_antisymm (hl _ h) (le_of_not_lt nlt)
            simp [this] at ne
          · exact h

        rintro (h | h)
        · exact h

        rintro (h | h)
        · have hgt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (not_lt.mp hnlt) hne.symm

induction l with

    split_ifs with heq hlt
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq; simp [h_v]

      exact absurd (h_le _ hl) (not_le_of_lt v_lt)

induction l with

    unfold fastCheckMem

    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq; simp [hin]

    · rw [ihr hor]; constructor <;> intro h
      · right; exact h
      · rcases h with h|h; swap; exact h; have := hle _ h;

induction l with

    exact beq_iff_eq _ _
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>

    · rw [ihr hor]

      have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hlt) (beq_iff_eq.not.mp heq).symm
      exact absurd (hle _ h) (not_le_of_lt this)

  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨h_le, h_ge, ho_l, ho_r, h_mem⟩
    unfold fastCheckMem
    split
    · next eq => simp_all [h_mem]
    · next ne =>
      split
      · next lt =>
        rw [ihl ho_l]
        constructor
        · exact Or.inl
        · rintro (h | h); exact h; have := h_ge _ h; linarith
      · next nlt =>
        rw [ihr ho_r]
        constructor
        · exact Or.inr
        · rintro (h | h)
          · have := h_le _ h
            have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt nlt) (by simp at ne; exact ne.symm)
            linarith
          · exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    rw [beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨h_le, h_ge, ho_l, ho_r, h_mem⟩
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    split_ifs with heq hlt
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq
      simp [LabelledTree.mem, h_mem]
    · rw [ih_l ho_l, LabelledTree.mem]
      constructor
      · intro h; left; exact h
      · rintro (h | h)
        · exact h
        · have := h_ge label h; linarith
    · rw [ih_r ho_r, LabelledTree.mem]
      constructor
      · intro h; right; exact h
      · rintro (h | h)
        · have := h_le label h; rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; linarith
        · exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨hle, hge, hlo, hro, hmem⟩
    simp only [fastCheckMem]
    split
    · next heq =>
      simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq
      simp [hmem]
    · next hne =>
      simp only [beq_iff_eq] at hne
      split
      · next hlt =>
        rw [ihl hlo]
        constructor
        · exact Or.inl
        · rintro (h | h)
          · exact h
          · exact (lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_le hlt (hge _ h))).elim
      · next hnlt =>
        rw [ihr hro]
        have hgt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hnlt) hne
        constructor
        · exact Or.inr
        · rintro (h | h)
          · exact (lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_le_of_lt (hle _ h) hgt)).elim
          · exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, hmem⟩
    unfold fastCheckMem
    split_ifs with heq hlt
    · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq
      simp [hmem]
    · rw [ihl hol]
      constructor
      · intro h; left; exact h
      · rintro (h | h)
        · exact h
        · have := hge label h; linarith
    · rw [ihr hor]
      constructor
      · intro h; right; exact h
      · rintro (h | h)
        · have := hle label h; simp at heq hlt; linarith
        · exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    rw [beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ih_l ih_r =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨h_le, h_ge, h_ol, h_or, h_v⟩
    unfold fastCheckMem
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq; subst h_eq
      simp [h_v]
    · rw [ih_l h_ol]
      constructor
      · exact Or.inl
      · rintro (hl | hr)
        · exact hl
        · exact absurd (h_ge label hr) (not_le_of_lt h_lt)
    · rw [ih_r h_or]
      constructor
      · exact Or.inr
      · rintro (hl | hr)
        · rw [beq_iff_eq] at h_eq
          have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_eq
          exact absurd (h_le label hl) (not_le_of_gt this)
        · exact hr

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hol, hor, hv⟩
    unfold fastCheckMem
    split_ifs with heq hlt
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq; simp [hv]
    · rw [ihl hol]; constructor
      · exact Or.inl
      · rintro (h | h); assumption; have := hr _ h; linarith
    · rw [ihr hor]; constructor
      · exact Or.inr
      · rintro (h | h); swap; assumption
        rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        have := hl _ h
        have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hlt) heq.symm
        linarith
